name: Aditya Pratap
summary:
I am a Computer Science student with expertise in developing full-stack web applications and a passion for coding. I
have successfully completed multiple projects using modern technologies like the MERN stack, React.js, and Redux,
along with a solid understanding of Data Structures and Algorithm and Object Oriented Programming.

projects.title: CodeArena
projects.description:
◦ Developed a full-stack coding platform where users can solve coding problems
◦ Implemented role-based access allowing admin to create, update, and manage coding problems
◦ Built secure authentication and authorization using JWT
◦ Integrated Redis caching reducing API response time by 65 percent and Judge0 API for multi-language
execution with 98.4 percent uptime
◦ Designed RESTful APIs for problem management, submissions, and user profiles
◦ Tech Stack: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs
